SQUALL-SQUALL.cardsModifierDescription: Squall cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
SQUALL-SQUALL.description: A disciplined SeeD mercenary trained at Balamb Garden. Build Firepower to deal more damage. Crush your enemies using Finishers and Guardian Force (GF).
SQUALL-SQUALL.title: SeeD Mercenary Squall
